phyloPal 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • Getting Started with phyloPal
  • Changelog

Package index

All functions

add_alpha()
Add alpha transparency to hex colors
build_dendrogram()
Build a dendrogram (and leaf order) from an ASV matrix
classify_taxa_patterns()
Classify taxa by abundance patterns across groups
combine_dendrogram_alluvial()
Combine dendrogram and alluvial plot with alignment and flexible legend placement
create_alluvial_dendrogram_plot()
Create an aligned alluvial + dendrogram figure (full workflow wrapper)
create_alluvial_plot()
Create an alluvial plot via the full workflow wrapper
create_grouped_matrix()
Create grouped ASV matrix by averaging within groups
em_metadata
Example sample metadata
em_otu
Example OTU matrix
example_microbiome
Example microbiome dataset
extract_legend_grob()
Extract a legend grob from a ggplot
generate_alluvial_palette()
Generate a color palette for alluvial plots from tax_color keys
generate_grouped_palette()
Generate grouped palettes using HCL colors
generate_palette_hcl()
Generate HCL color palette for taxonomic visualization
plot_alluvial()
Create an alluvial (Sankey) plot of taxonomic composition across groups
plot_dendrogram()
Plot a dendrogram as ggplot with optional tip aesthetics (color/fill/shape/size) and labels
plot_taxonomic_barplot()
Create stacked taxonomic barplots with optional faceting and strip theming
prepare_alluvial_data()
Aggregate microbiome data for alluvial plot visualization
process_barplot_data()
Process barplot data at specified taxonomic level
replace_incertae_sedis_NAs()
Normalize Incertae sedis and fill missing taxonomy ranks
theme_phylopal()
A clean minimal theme for phyloPal plots

Developed by Magdalena W. Slawinska.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
